expectations.text: Creates a prefillTransformer function that returns ssn, vaFileNumber, and fullName
Imports and adds profilePersonalInfoPage() to formConfig chapters
expectations.evidence: Imports and adds profilePersonalInfoPage to a chapter

expectations.text: Imports and adds profileContactInfoPages() to formConfig chapters OR explains why it should not be added
expectations.evidence: Skips profileContactInfoPages — identifies custom field names (claimantAddress, veteranMailingAddress) as incompatible with standard pattern

expectations.text: Adds route protection logic in App.jsx that checks for login and save-in-progress data
expectations.evidence: Adds redirect logic checking login and save-in-progress data

expectations.text: Creates or updates mock test fixtures (sip-get.json or similar) for local testing
Does not remove or break any existing form functionality

quality_bonuses.text: Correctly identifies when profileContactInfoPages is incompatible with the form's data model and explains the reasoning
quality_bonuses.evidence: Identifies custom field names and missing standard contact fields

notes: Without-skill also independently identifies the data model incompatibility — model is smart enough to detect custom field names on its own
